clearMessageWarning: Please be advised that by submitting this message, all subsequent messages will be deleted!
clearConversationWarning: Please be advised that by confirming this action, all messages will be deleted!
author: Made by Hwan
name: Name
morePrompts: You can find more prompts here:
reduceMessagesWarning: This action will remove the oldest messages until the total token count is within limit. Are you sure you want to continue?
hiddenMessagesWarning: {{hiddenTokens}} tokens of messages are hidden to stay within the {{reduceMessagesToTotalToken}} token limit.
reduceMessagesFailedImportWarning: Importing this data may exceed local storage quota. Proceed by reducing the number of messages?
partialImportWarning: Some messages could not be imported: {{message}}. Do you want to import what was successfully parsed?
enterToSubmitDesc: Press ↵ to send, Shift+↵ for new line
autoScrollDesc: Follow the response as it streams
countTotalTokensDesc: Track and display token usage costs
displayChatSizeDesc: Show message count in the chat list
importDescription: Select a previously exported chat file to restore your conversations.
exportDescription: Download all your chats and folders as a JSON file for backup or transfer.
onlyImagesSupported: Only image files can be uploaded. Non-image files were skipped.
